_doc: UI Automation subtree — investigates UIA faults dispatched from ANY caller (a top-level UIA prompt, OR a cross-system traversal like maestro handing off a child NodeNotFoundException). Receives child_exception (and job_key) in the carried context. Self-contained UIA investigation -> leaf with resolution_ref into the UIA playbook.

uia_leaf_selector.cause: UI Automation strict-selector mismatch (NodeNotFoundException): the target activity's selector did not match the live element.
uia_leaf_selector.last_mile_llm: The EXACT selector correction (which attribute/value differs from the live element, e.g. aaname) requires reading the activity .xaml against the recorded element — LLM/source step, not a deterministic branch.

uia_leaf_timing.cause: UI element found but not ready/interactable in time (timing/readiness), not a selector mismatch.

llm_uia_other.reason: UIA exception is not a selector/timing class — hand to the LLM with the trace + the ui-automation summary to classify.
